_readme: Written by the Cowork laptop task. Board reads this every 15 min. Keep newest first, max ~8 posts. 'time' is the post's UTC timestamp; the board renders GST.

posts.text:
City Are Back! 🩵 

Fans are invited to watch our Men’s First Team continue pre-season preparations at a special open training session at the Joie Stadium on Thursday 13 August.

Everyone at Manchester City is devastated to learn our former manager Kevin Keegan has passed away, aged 75.

Kevin was a transformative manager who brought optimism and vibrancy to City during his four-year spell in charge.

The promotion campaign in 2001/02 will never be forgotten, and Kevin then established us once again as a top Premier League side in the years that followed.

Our thoughts are with Kevin’s family and friends at this very difficult time.

Win a shirt signed by our World Cup winner, Rodri ✍️

Enter here ➡️ http://mancity.co/RodriSignedShirt…

Several items from @PepTeam's office are up for auction 🤝

Explore all the items on offer below ⤵️
🔗 http://mancity.co/PepGuardiolaAuction…
